post.title: Team Notes: Week Two
post.excerpt: Raw observations on the team, what I'm seeing, and what I want to fix.
post.contentHtml:
This is a private post. Only people with the password can read this.

Use private posts for things you want to write down and share with a select group - raw reflections, team updates, or anything that isn't quite ready for the public.

To change the password, open pages/blog/[slug].tsx and update the BLOG_PASSWORD variable at the top of the file.
